issues.description: DSL is missing the conditional action. Card text has two distinct actions: (1) FlipLife (unconditional, 'You may'), and (2) conditional GiveDon action that only triggers if Leader has {Kid Pirates} type. Current DSL only captures the first action.
Missing second action: 'add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active' requires a conditional GiveDon action with LeaderHasType condition for {Kid Pirates}
